questionHtml:
How is involuntary peristalsis in the intestine directly controlled in humans?


A.  By the endocrine system

B.  By the central nervous system (CNS)

C.  By the sympathetic nervous system

D.  By the enteric nervous system (ENS)

meta.title: How is involuntary peristalsis in the intestine directly controlled in humans? A. By the endocrine system B. By the central nervous system (CNS) C. By the sympathetic nervous syste
breadcrumbLabels: C3.1.16. Control of peristalsis in the digestive system by the central nervous system and enteric nervous system
